description: Pay-per-use SEO tools via x402 protocol — content briefs, keyword research, SERP analysis, backlink profiles, and on-page audits. $0.50-$3.00 per request in USDC on Base.

environmentVariables.name: SEO_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the SEO API (default: https://seodesignlab-paywall.seodesignlab.workers.dev)

environmentVariables.name: X402_PAY_TO
environmentVariables.description: Wallet address to receive x402 payments
